nasb.text: He who has believed and has been baptized shall be saved; but he who has disbelieved shall be condemned.

esv.text: Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved, but whoever does not believe will be condemned.

cnv.text: 信而受洗的必定得救，不信的必被定罪。

ccb.text: 相信并接受洗礼的人必定得救，不肯相信的人必被定罪。

csbs.text: 信而受洗的人，将会得救；不信的人，将被定罪。
